2355300.name: PAIN-TO-WIN: DEMO
2355300.description:
PAIN-TO-WIN is a top-down horror-shooter set in a dystopian prison-world that will never happen. You play as an organ extractor, earning money by bounty hunting madmen, psychos, and other violent degenerates. Inspired by PSX-era maniac aesthetics like LOADED and THRILL KILL, mixed with the top-down gore and mayhem of modern Miami-like games.

Chaotic Mess of Combat

Explosive and brutal gunfights with destructible level environments create chaotic combat, bloodshed, and gore — each encounter can leave the map twisted and ruined.

Megaprison Freaks

Explore the Megaprison and meet its psycho inmates — violent brain-surgery addicts, broken minds, and body-mod fanatics. They’ll trade organs, share deranged stories, offer side quests… or try to kill you.

World of Pain

Buy perks and upgrades to survive a little longer and crawl deeper inside a world fueled by hate, torture, and crude surgery.

Deadly Maze of Madness

Handcrafted, highly detailed non-pixel art levels — packed with dangers, secrets, and mobs of deranged enemies — connect through a shifting maze with rogue-lite elements, making every run feel a little different.
